# AAAA Nexus

> 200+ formally verified AI safety + DeFi API endpoints across 30 product families. Mathematical proofs, not benchmarks.

## API Base URL
https://atomadic.tech

## MCP Server
https://atomadic.tech/mcp

## OpenAPI Spec
https://atomadic.tech/openapi.json

## A2A Agent Card
https://atomadic.tech/.well-known/agent.json

## Free Trial
3 calls/IP/day on every paid endpoint. No API key required. 2s delay (paid calls: no delay).

## Pricing
- Credit packs: $8 (500 calls) / $15 (2,500 calls) / $49 (10,000 calls) — never expire
- Pay via Stripe (card) or USDC on Base L2 (chain ID 8453)
- API key header: X-API-Key
- x402 micropayments: PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header (automated agent payments)

## Free Endpoints (no auth)
- GET /health
- GET /v1/oracle/entropy
- GET /v1/agents/topology
- GET /.well-known/agent.json
- GET /openapi.json

## DeFi Suite — Formally Verified DeFi Infrastructure

### LP Parameter Optimization — DFP-100-OptimalTick
POST /v1/defi/optimize
Fee: $0.08 + 0.2% of position size
Body: {"protocol":"uniswap_v3","position":{"token_a":"ETH","token_b":"USDC","amount_usd":50000},"risk_tolerance":"medium"}

### Risk Scoring — DFI-101-RiskScoreBound
POST /v1/defi/risk-score
Fee: $0.08/call (flat)
Body: {"protocol":"aave","position":{"token_a":"ETH","token_b":"USDC","amount_usd":50000,"leverage":2.5},"market_conditions":{"volatility":"medium"}}

### Oracle Guard — OGD-100-ManipulationBound
POST /v1/defi/oracle-verify
Fee: $0.04 + 0.1% of tvl_at_risk
Body: {"oracle_address":"0x...","price_feed":3421.50,"reference_price":3400.00,"asset":"ETH/USD","tvl_at_risk":2000000}

### Liquid Shield — LQS-100-LiquidationBound
POST /v1/defi/liquidation-check
Fee: $0.04 + 1% of net equity (collateral - debt)
Body: {"position_id":"pos-001","collateral_value":150000,"debt_value":95000,"collateral_factor":0.80}

### Bridge Proof — BRP-100-BridgeIntegrity
POST /v1/defi/bridge-verify
Fee: $0.08/verification
Body: {"bridge_id":"stargate","source_chain":"ethereum","dest_chain":"base","amount":50000,"token":"USDC"}

### Contract Verify — CVR-100-AuditBound
POST /v1/defi/contract-audit
Fee: $0.15/audit
Body: {"contract_id":"0xabc...","contract_type":"amm"}

### Yield Oracle — YLD-100-YieldConvergence
POST /v1/defi/yield-optimize
Fee: $0.04 + 2% of alpha generated
Body: {"principal_usd":100000,"risk_tolerance":"medium"}

### VRF Gaming — VRF-100
POST /v1/vrf/draw
Fee: $0.01 + 0.5% of pot_value_usd
Body: {"game_id":"lottery-1","round":42,"range_max":1000,"pot_value_usd":5000}

### VRF Verify — VRF-101 (included with draw)
POST /v1/vrf/verify-draw
Body: {"draw_id":"vrf-3a9f1c2d","expected_value":734}

## Compliance Suite — EU AI Act · NIST AI RMF · ISO 42001

### Full Compliance Check — $0.04/check
POST /v1/compliance/check
Body: {"system_id":"model-prod","system_type":"high_risk","frameworks":["eu_ai_act","nist_rmf","iso_42001"]}

### EU AI Act Certificate — $0.04/check
POST /v1/compliance/eu-ai-act
Body: {"system_id":"loan-decision","risk_category":"high_risk","intended_purpose":"creditworthiness_assessment"}

### Fairness Proof — FNS-100-FairnessBound — $0.04/check
POST /v1/compliance/fairness
Body: {"model_id":"loan-classifier","dataset_id":"eval-q1","protected_attrs":["gender","age_group"],"metric":"disparate_impact"}

### Explainability Certificate — XPL-100-ExplainBound — $0.04/call
POST /v1/compliance/explain
Body: {"model_id":"credit-scorer","decision_id":"dec-994f","subject_context":"loan_denial"}

### Data Lineage — LIN-100-ChainIntegrity — $0.04/call
POST /v1/compliance/lineage
Body: {"model_id":"fraud-detector","dataset_stages":[{"stage":"source","hash":"sha256:a3f9..."},{"stage":"validated","hash":"sha256:cc1d..."}]}

### Oversight Log — $0.02/event
POST /v1/compliance/oversight
Body: {"system_id":"model-prod","reviewer_id":"human-rev-01","decision":"approved","notes":"Output reviewed"}

### Oversight History — $0.02/query
GET /v1/compliance/oversight/history?system_id=model-prod

### Incident Report — $0.02/report
POST /v1/compliance/incident
Body: {"system_id":"model-prod","severity":"serious","description":"Biased output","affected_users":12}

### Incident Registry — $0.02/query
GET /v1/compliance/incidents?system_id=model-prod

### Transparency Report — $0.08/report
POST /v1/compliance/transparency
Body: {"system_id":"loan-scorer","period":"2026-Q1","include":["fairness","drift","oversight"]}

### DriftGuard — DRG-100-DriftBound — $0.01/check
POST /v1/drift/check
Body: {"model_id":"model-prod","reference_window":"2026-01","current_window":"2026-04"}

### Drift Certificate — $0.01/cert
GET /v1/drift/certificate?id=drg-5a2b

## Trust Oracle — TCM-100-BoundedMonotonicity

POST /v1/trust/score — $0.04/call
Body: {"agent_id":"did:key:z6Mkm..."}

GET /v1/trust/history?agent_id=... — $0.04/query

## Core AI Safety Endpoints

### Hallucination Oracle
POST /v1/oracle/hallucination — $0.04/call
Body: {"text":"The model output to verify","context":"optional context"}

### RatchetGate Session Security
POST /v1/ratchet/register — $0.02/call
POST /v1/ratchet/advance — $0.02/call
POST /v1/ratchet/status — $0.004/call
POST /v1/ratchet/probe — $0.02/call

### VeriRand Quantum RNG
GET /v1/rng/quantum — Free
POST /v1/verirand/bytes — Paid

### Agent Intelligence
POST /v1/agents/semantic-diff — $0.04/call
POST /v1/agents/intent-classify — $0.02/call
POST /v1/agents/reputation — $0.04/call
POST /v1/agents/plan — $0.06/call
POST /v1/agents/contradiction — $0.02/call

### Escrow & A2A Economy
POST /v1/escrow/create — $0.04/call
POST /v1/escrow/release — $0.02/call
POST /v1/escrow/status — $0.008/call
POST /v1/escrow/dispute — $0.06/call

### Reputation Ledger
POST /v1/reputation/record — $0.02/call
GET /v1/reputation/score — $0.008/call

### SLA Management
POST /v1/sla/register — $0.08/call
POST /v1/sla/report — $0.02/call
GET /v1/sla/status — $0.008/call

### Text Processing
POST /v1/text/summarize — $0.04/call
POST /v1/text/keywords — $0.02/call
POST /v1/text/sentiment — $0.02/call

### Threat Scoring
POST /v1/threat/score — $0.06/call
POST /v1/security/zero-day — $0.04/call

### HELIX Model Downloads (one-time purchase)
- LLaMA 3.2 1B — $19
- Phi-3.5 Mini — $29
- Qwen2.5 7B — $49

### Prompt Packs (one-time download)
From $9 per pack. 16 packs across healthcare, legal, fintech, AI safety, cybersecurity, and more.
See: https://atomadic.tech/packs

## x402 Payment Protocol

```
# Step 1: Call any paid endpoint — get 402 challenge
curl -X POST https://atomadic.tech/v1/trust/score \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"agent_id":"did:key:z6Mkm..."}'
# Returns: HTTP 402 with PAYMENT-REQUIRED header and JSON body

# Step 2: Pay USDC on Base L2 (chain 8453) to treasury
# Treasury: 0xCBd9e4c44958ee76E0F941106Ea960D476c48FD9
# USDC contract: 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913

# Step 3: Retry with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header
curl -X POST https://atomadic.tech/v1/trust/score \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "PAYMENT-SIGNATURE: <sig>;<pk>;<txid>;<amount_micro>;<drift>;<nonce>" \
  -d '{"agent_id":"did:key:z6Mkm..."}'
```

## MCP Integration

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "aaaa-nexus": {
      "url": "https://atomadic.tech/mcp",
      "transport": "http"
    }
  }
}
```
